ab: Rngagi quri isu nanaq han!
Walis Huwac ka hangan mu, maxal hngkwasan ka yaku sayang.
en: My name is Walis Huwac, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: Ima ka hangan su hug?
Hangan mu o Ubing Pawan.
Meenu klgan seejiq ka isu hug?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: Laqi Amis ka yaku.
Tnpusu seejiq kana ka tnsapah su hug?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Iq! Amis kana ka tnsapah mu.
ch: B:是的!我們全家都是阿美族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Amis.

ab: Tnpusu seejiq kana ka tnsapah su hug?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: Uxay, Amis ka tama mu, klmukan ka bubu mu.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是阿美族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Amis, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: Laqi su ima ka isu hug?
Laqi ku Pawan Nomin ka yaku.
Tama su ka gaga hug? Piya ka hngkwasan na da?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Mataru kmxalan ka hngkwasan na da!
Tama su ka gaga hug? Piya ka hngkwasan na da?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: Uxay, rudan alang ta ka hiya, maspac kmxalan ka hngkwasan na da!
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了!
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: Piya hngkwasan ka qbsuran su snaw dhug?
Maxal maspac ka hngkwasan qbsuran snaw mu da.
Rabang paru hngkwasan isu ka qbsuran su snaw hug?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: Rabang paru rima hngkwasan ka qbsuran mu snaw.
Piya snkukuh kmbragan ka bbaraw hnigan su hug?
Kingal kbkuy spatul snkukuh kmbragan ka yaku.
Sndamac, ya wada mdakil hnigan su dhug?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: Kiya hmi, Kingal kbkuy mtrul snkukuh kmbragan mu da!
Uxay su wada qthur da?
Ungac, Qnuqu su qnita da!
Mliwang su dhug?
Ini, qthur ku da!
Qthur su dhug?
Iq, mtrul ka hngjilan mu sayang da!
